example_sentence: 家长应该督促孩子按时完成作业。
example_sentence_en: Parents should urge their children to finish homework on time.

example_sentence: 很多家长在暑假期间带孩子去参加钢琴考级。
example_sentence_en: Many parents take their children for piano grade exams during summer break.

example_sentence: 对他来说，能吃顿饱饭就是一种奢望。
example_sentence_en: For him, being able to eat a full meal is an extravagant hope.

mandarin_意义: 长期接触好的事物而受到影响。
example_sentence: 他从小在书香门第长大，受到很好的传统文化熏陶。
example_sentence_en: He grew up in a scholarly family and received a fine traditional cultural influence.

example_sentence: 这家音乐厅经常举办高雅艺术演出。
example_sentence_en: This concert hall often hosts refined artistic performances.

example_sentence: 政府正在努力通过多种渠道解决大学生就业问题。
example_sentence_en: The government is working hard to solve graduate employment through various channels.

example_sentence: 我们应该尊重孩子选择专业的个人意愿。
example_sentence_en: We should respect children's personal aspirations when choosing a major.

mandarin_意义: 辛苦地用在某些事上的心思。
example_sentence: 父母的这一片苦心，你现在还不能完全理解。
example_sentence_en: You can't fully understand your parents' painstaking efforts yet.

example_sentence: 如果期望值定得太高，很容易产生挫败感。
example_sentence_en: If the expectation level is set too high, it's easy to feel frustrated.

example_sentence: 祝你学业进步，鹏程万里。
example_sentence_en: I wish you academic progress and a bright future ahead.

example_sentence: 我料他今天不会来，没想到他提前到了。
example_sentence_en: I expected he wouldn't come today, but he arrived early.

example_sentence: 考试结果如何，只要尽力而为就没有遗憾。
example_sentence_en: Whatever the exam result, as long as you do your best, you will have no regrets.

example_sentence: 但愿明天的天气晴朗，我们的活动能顺利进行。
example_sentence_en: I only hope the weather is clear tomorrow so our activity can go smoothly.

example_sentence: 父母辛苦工作，就是为了供孩子读书成才。
example_sentence_en: Parents work hard just to support their children's education and success.

mandarin_意义: 全部承担办理；也指家长替子女决定一切。
英文意义: take charge of everything; arrange for someone
example_sentence: 父母不应该包办孩子的所有人生选择。
example_sentence_en: Parents should not arrange every life choice for their children.

example_sentence: 为了能让孩子受到更好的教育，父母心甘情愿吃苦。
example_sentence_en: To give their child a better education, parents are perfectly willing to endure hardship.

example_sentence: 面对困难，保持一个积极乐观的心态很重要。
example_sentence_en: When facing difficulties, maintaining a positive and optimistic mindset is important.

example_sentence: 老教授无私地向年轻人传授学术知识。
example_sentence_en: The old professor selflessly passed on academic knowledge to young people.

英文意义: wash one's hands of; let go
example_sentence: 孩子已经长大了，父母应该学会撒手。
example_sentence_en: The children have grown up; parents should learn to let go.

example_sentence: 父母不应把自己的愿望强加给孩子。
example_sentence_en: Parents should not impose their own wishes on their children.
usage_note: Suggests lack of respect for others' will.

example_sentence: 只要有足够的信心，就没有克服不了的困难。
example_sentence_en: As long as there is sufficient confidence, no difficulty is insurmountable.

mandarin_意义: 事物完成后所表现的力量。
example_sentence: 这种酒的后劲很大，喝的时候要小心。
example_sentence_en: This wine has a strong after-effect; be careful when drinking.

mandarin_意义: 比喻违反规律、急于求成反而坏事。
英文意义: spoil things by rushing growth (lit. pull up seedlings)
example_sentence: 学习要循序渐进，揠苗助长只会适得其反。
example_sentence_en: Learning should be gradual; rushing progress only backfires.

example_sentence: 他在数学竞赛中的表现，被大家称为神童。
example_sentence_en: His performance in the math competition led people to call him a prodigy.

mandarin_意义: 了不起；也形容程度很深。
example_sentence: 这孩子才五岁就会背几十首诗，真了不得。
example_sentence_en: This child can recite dozens of poems at five—remarkable.

example_sentence: 作家经常去农村体验生活，寻找灵感。
example_sentence_en: Writers often go to the countryside to experience life and find inspiration.

example_sentence: 希望你能在新的学期里学业进步。
example_sentence_en: I hope you make progress in your studies in the new semester.

example_sentence: 他性格过于急躁，这是他最大的弱点。
example_sentence_en: He is too impatient; that's his biggest weakness.

example_sentence: 大学不仅是学习知识的地方，也是练习人际交往的场所。
example_sentence_en: University is not just for learning knowledge, but also for practicing interpersonal communication.

example_sentence: 他在医学研究方面取得了卓越的成就。
example_sentence_en: He has achieved outstanding results in medical research.

example_sentence: 成绩的好坏，主要取决于你平时的努力。
example_sentence_en: Whether grades are good depends mainly on your usual effort.

mandarin_意义: 理解和解决问题的能力。
example_sentence: 充足的睡眠对青少年的智力发育非常重要。
example_sentence_en: Sufficient sleep is very important for the intellectual development of teenagers.

example_sentence: 邻居们都夸奖他是一个懂事的好孩子。
example_sentence_en: The neighbors all praised him for being a sensible child.

example_sentence: 这次旅行带给我许多意想不到的惊喜。
example_sentence_en: This trip brought me many unexpected surprises.

example_sentence: 我们需要从多个层面来分析这个问题。
example_sentence_en: We need to analyze this problem from multiple levels.

example_sentence: 教育不应该过于功利，要关注学生的全面发展。
example_sentence_en: Education shouldn't be too utilitarian; it must focus on overall development.

example_sentence: 小孩子挑食容易导致营养不均衡。
example_sentence_en: Children being picky about food can easily lead to nutritional imbalance.

example_sentence: 现在的孩子大都是独生子女，难免有些娇气。
example_sentence_en: Most children today are only children, so it's unavoidable they're a bit fragile.

example_sentence: 他的心理承受能力比较脆弱，经不起打击。
example_sentence_en: His mental resilience is quite fragile and can't take a blow.

example_sentence: 在人生的道路上，谁都会遇到一些挫折。
example_sentence_en: On the road of life, everyone will encounter some setbacks.

example_sentence: 作为一名医生，必须能承受巨大的工作压力。
example_sentence_en: As a doctor, one must be able to bear huge work pressure.

example_sentence: 虽然他的智商很高，但学习并不努力。
example_sentence_en: Although his IQ is high, he doesn't work hard at studying.

example_sentence: 在职场中，情商往往比智商更重要。
example_sentence_en: In the workplace, EQ is often more important than IQ.

example_sentence: 他在上大学前就学会了生活自理。
example_sentence_en: He learned to take care of himself before going to university.

mandarin_意义: 感叹父母对子女的无私关爱。
英文意义: parents' love for their children is boundless
example_sentence: 孩子长大后，才真正懂得可怜天下父母心。
example_sentence_en: Only when children grow up do they truly understand their parents' selfless love.
usage_note: Famous line from a poem; often spoken by parents.

pinyin: sān tiān dǎ yú liǎng tiān shài wǎng
mandarin_意义: 比喻做事没有恒心，时断时续。
英文意义: work by fits and starts; lack persistence
example_sentence: 学习语言不能三天打鱼两天晒网，要坚持每天练习。
example_sentence_en: You can't study a language by fits and starts; practice every day.

mandarin_意义: 比喻对孩子不管不问、放任自流。
英文意义: let children run wild; neglect supervision
example_sentence: 家长不能对孩子放羊，该管的时候还是要管。
example_sentence_en: Parents cannot neglect their children; discipline is needed when appropriate.

hanzi: 吃得苦中苦，方为人上人
pinyin: chī dé kǔ zhōng kǔ, fāng wéi rén shàng rén
mandarin_意义: 能吃苦才能取得更大进步。
英文意义: only by enduring hardship can one excel
example_sentence: 他相信吃得苦中苦，方为人上人，所以训练从不偷懒。
example_sentence_en: He believes only hardship leads to excellence, so he never slacks in training.

pinyin: wàng zǐ chéng lóng, wàng nǚ chéng fèng
example_sentence: 父母望子成龙、望女成凤，但也要尊重孩子的兴趣。
example_sentence_en: Parents hope their children will succeed, but should also respect their interests.

mandarin_意义: 不患得患失、顺其自然的心态。
example_sentence: 比赛前要保持平常心，才能发挥正常水平。
example_sentence_en: Keep an ordinary mindset before a competition to perform at your normal level.

mandarin_意义: 长跑项目；比喻需要长期坚持的事。
example_sentence: 学好一门语言就像跑马拉松，靠的是长期坚持。
example_sentence_en: Mastering a language is like a marathon—it depends on persistence.

mandarin_意义: 别着急，慢慢来；也指别太用力。
example_sentence: 最近太累了，你悠着点儿，别硬撑。
example_sentence_en: You've been too tired lately—take it easy and don't push yourself.

mandarin_意义: 对天的俗称，多表感叹或无奈。
example_sentence: 这事儿能不能成，就看老天爷了。
example_sentence_en: Whether this works out depends on Heaven now.

mandarin_意义: 比喻瘦弱、缺乏锻炼的孩子。
example_sentence: 孩子要多运动，别整天坐着，瘦得像豆芽菜。
example_sentence_en: Children should exercise more instead of sitting all day and becoming thin as bean sprouts.

example_sentence: 幼儿园里几个小胖墩跑来跑去，特别可爱。
example_sentence_en: Several chubby kids ran around the kindergarten—they were adorable.

pinyin: yī lái shēn shǒu, fàn lái zhāng kǒu
mandarin_意义: 形容生活懒散，什么都要别人伺候。
英文意义: have everything done for one; be pampered
example_sentence: 孩子已经大了，不能再衣来伸手、饭来张口。
example_sentence_en: The child is grown up and can no longer have everything done for them.

mandarin_意义: 比喻经不起挫折、抗压能力差的年轻人。
example_sentence: 社会竞争很激烈，年轻人不能做草莓族，一碰就碎。
example_sentence_en: Competition is fierce; young people cannot be fragile like strawberries.

example_sentence: 穿上白色的婚纱是很多女孩的梦想。
example_sentence_en: Wearing a white wedding dress is the dream of many girls.

example_sentence: 他病还没好就急着出院，结果又折腾病了。
example_sentence_en: He rushed to leave the hospital before recovering and ended up getting sick again from the fuss.

英文意义: as beautiful as flowers and jade
example_sentence: 新娘子长得如花似玉，大家都夸好看。
example_sentence_en: The bride is as beautiful as flowers and jade; everyone praises her looks.

example_sentence: 指挥家穿着整洁的燕尾服走上了舞台。
example_sentence_en: The conductor walked onto the stage wearing a neat swallowtail coat.

example_sentence: 他在公共场合总是表现得很有绅士风度。
example_sentence_en: He always behaves with a very gentlemanly manner in public.

example_sentence: 这对老夫妻一起走过了几十年的风风雨雨。
example_sentence_en: This old couple has gone through decades of trials and tribulations together.

example_sentence: 无论做多少事，也无法弥补我内心的愧疚。
example_sentence_en: No matter how much I do, I cannot make up for the guilt in my heart.

example_sentence: 虽然婚礼很圆满，但父母没能到场，仍有一点缺憾。
example_sentence_en: Though the wedding was perfect, her parents could not attend, leaving a small regret.

example_sentence: 这是孩子的一片孝心，你就收下吧。
example_sentence_en: This is the child's filial heart; please accept it.

example_sentence: 那位老教授一生过着清贫而充实的生活。
example_sentence_en: That old professor lived a humble but fulfilling life.

example_sentence: 我最怀念童年时代那份纯真的快乐。
example_sentence_en: I miss that pure happiness of childhood most.

英文意义: in the same boat; through thick and thin
example_sentence: 在公司最困难的时候，员工们选择与老板风雨同舟。
example_sentence_en: During the company's hardest time, employees chose to stand with the boss through thick and thin.

example_sentence: 他们夫妻俩在艰难的岁月里相濡以沫。
example_sentence_en: The couple helped each other out through the hard years.

example_sentence: 夫妻之间的感情，是在柴米油盐中慢慢酿造出来的。
example_sentence_en: A couple's affection is slowly brewed through daily life together.

example_sentence: 作者把少年比喻成早晨八九点钟的太阳。
example_sentence_en: The author likened youth to the sun at eight or nine in the morning.

example_sentence: 这个形容词用在这里非常贴切。
example_sentence_en: This adjective is very apt here.

example_sentence: 勤奋和坚持是成功的唯一秘诀。
example_sentence_en: Hard work and persistence are the only secrets to success.

example_sentence: 只要大方向是对的，这些细节都无关紧要。
example_sentence_en: As long as the general direction is right, these details are immaterial.

example_sentence: 家人之间应该互相包容，多一些理解。
example_sentence_en: Family members should tolerate each other and have more understanding.

example_sentence: 新员工和团队之间还需要一段时间的磨合。
example_sentence_en: New employees and the team still need some time to fit in.

example_sentence: 微笑是化解尴尬的最好办法。
example_sentence_en: A smile is the best way to resolve embarrassment.

mandarin_意义: 比喻忽然明白、豁然开朗。
example_sentence: 经老师一点拨，我对这道题茅塞顿开。
example_sentence_en: After the teacher's hint, I suddenly understood this problem.

example_sentence: 婚姻不是爱情的坟墓。
example_sentence_en: Marriage is not the grave of love.

example_sentence: 贪婪往往是导致人生悲剧的根源。
example_sentence_en: Greed is often the root cause of personal tragedy.

example_sentence: 在婚礼上，亲友们都祝福新人白头到老。
example_sentence_en: At the wedding, friends and family wished the couple to grow old together.

example_sentence: 他这人很低调，从来不四处张扬自己的成绩。
example_sentence_en: He is very low-key and never flaunts his achievements everywhere.

英文意义: compromise for the sake of the whole
example_sentence: 为了维持团队的和谐，他只好委曲求全。
example_sentence_en: To maintain team harmony, he had to compromise.

example_sentence: 他们俩在结婚前已经同居一年了。
example_sentence_en: The two had already been cohabiting for a year before getting married.

example_sentence: 为了避免日后产生纠纷，他们去做了婚前财产公证。
example_sentence_en: To avoid future disputes, they went for a pre-marital property notarization.

example_sentence: 这对热恋中的情侣计划明年结婚。
example_sentence_en: This couple deeply in love plans to get married next year.

example_sentence: 任何一方违约，都必须支付违约金。
example_sentence_en: If either party breaches the contract, they must pay a penalty.

example_sentence: 面对危机，他做出了一个非常明智的决定。
example_sentence_en: Facing the crisis, he made a very wise decision.

example_sentence: 邻里之间难免会产生一些小纠纷。
example_sentence_en: It's unavoidable that small disputes arise between neighbors.

example_sentence: 大家都是好朋友，你就别见外了。
example_sentence_en: We are all good friends; don't be so formal/treat me like an outsider.
usage_note: Usually used as "don't be a stranger."

example_sentence: 由于缺乏统一的管理，这个小组的组织很松散。
example_sentence_en: Due to lack of unified management, this group's organization is loose.

英文意义: a rustle in the grass; sign of trouble
example_sentence: 这个消息非常敏感，有一点风吹草动都会引起股市波动。
example_sentence_en: This news is very sensitive; any slight change will cause stock fluctuations.

mandarin_意义: 言行不顾是否适合(谦辞)。
example_sentence: 我想冒昧地请教您一个问题。
example_sentence_en: I'd like to take the liberty of asking you a question.

example_sentence: 虽然是后妈，但她对孩子比亲妈还亲。
example_sentence_en: Although she is the stepmother, she is closer to the child than a biological mother.

mandarin_意义: 不再坚持原来的说法或态度。
example_sentence: 商量了很久，父母终于松口，同意他出国学习。
example_sentence_en: After long discussion, his parents finally relented and agreed to let him study abroad.

example_sentence: 处理好婆媳关系是家庭和谐的重要部分。
example_sentence_en: Handling the mother-daughter-in-law relationship well is key to family harmony.

example_sentence: 这个小女孩长得漂亮，嘴巴也甜，非常乖巧。
example_sentence_en: This little girl is pretty and well-spoken; she's very clever and obedient.

mandarin_意义: 结婚时发给亲友的糖果。
example_sentence: 婚礼上，新人向宾客分发喜糖，表示感谢。
example_sentence_en: At the wedding, the couple handed out wedding candy to guests in thanks.
usage_note: Symbol of celebration and sharing joy.

英文意义: person who has been through it; old hand
example_sentence: 感情的事，还是听听过来人的建议比较好。
example_sentence_en: In matters of love, it's better to listen to advice from those with experience.

mandarin_意义: 保持新鲜；比喻保持感情不褪色。
example_sentence: 夫妻要经常沟通，才能给感情保鲜。
example_sentence_en: Couples need to communicate often to keep their relationship fresh.

pinyin: jīn wú zú chì, rén wú wán rén
example_sentence: 夫妻之间要互相包容，金无足赤，人无完人。
example_sentence_en: Spouses should tolerate each other—nobody is perfect.

mandarin_意义: 比喻相爱的人觉得对方什么都好。
英文意义: love is blind (beauty in the lover's eyes)
example_sentence: 在他们看来，情人眼里出西施，对方的小缺点也不算什么。
example_sentence_en: In their eyes, love is blind and even small flaws do not matter.

pinyin: zhēng yī zhī yǎn bì yī zhī yǎn
mandarin_意义: 比喻对小问题装作没看见。
搭配: 有时只能～；别什么都～；学会～
example_sentence: 邻里之间的小摩擦，不妨睁一只眼闭一只眼。
example_sentence_en: For minor neighborhood friction, you can turn a blind eye.

mandarin_意义: 指为人处事宜糊涂一些，不必事事计较。
英文意义: where ignorance is bliss, folly to be wise
example_sentence: 家庭琐事不必争个对错，难得糊涂反而省心。
example_sentence_en: Don't argue over every household detail—sometimes bliss is better.

example_sentence: 这么大的决定不能冲动，要三思而后行。
example_sentence_en: Such a big decision cannot be impulsive—you must think twice.

mandarin_意义: 比喻婚姻像被围的城：外面想进去，里面想出来。
example_sentence: 有人说婚姻是围城，结婚和离婚的人各有各的体会。
example_sentence_en: Some say marriage is a besieged fortress—those inside and outside each have their own feelings.

mandarin_意义: 先把不好听、不利的话说明白。
英文意义: let me be frank upfront; fair warning
example_sentence: 合作之前丑话说在前头，免得以后产生误会。
example_sentence_en: Let's be frank before cooperating so there are no misunderstandings later.

英文意义: be more cautious; have an extra eye open
example_sentence: 上次被骗以后，他办事多了一个心眼儿。
example_sentence_en: After being cheated last time, he became more cautious in handling things.

mandarin_意义: 比喻思想一时接受不了。
英文意义: can't get one's head around it; slow to adjust
example_sentence: 这个新政策他一时转不过弯来，需要慢慢理解。
example_sentence_en: He can't get his head around the new policy yet and needs time to understand.

mandarin_意义: 通过谈话帮助对方提高认识、转变态度。
example_sentence: 班主任找学生做思想工作，帮他端正学习态度。
example_sentence_en: The homeroom teacher talked with the student to help him adjust his attitude toward study.

英文意义: when all is said and done; in the final analysis
example_sentence: 家庭矛盾说到底，还是沟通不够。
example_sentence_en: When all is said and done, family conflicts come down to insufficient communication.

pinyin: hé nǐ yīqǐ mànman biàn lǎo
mandarin_意义: 形容夫妻相伴一生、白头偕老。
example_sentence: 婚礼上，新郎说最浪漫的事，就是和你一起慢慢变老。
example_sentence_en: At the wedding, the groom said the most romantic thing is growing old together with you.

example_sentence: 横跨大西洋的航行是一次真正的壮举。
example_sentence_en: Sailing across the Atlantic was a truly magnificent feat.

example_sentence: 他把积攒多年的养老钱都捐给了灾区。
example_sentence_en: He donated all his retirement savings to the disaster area.

example_sentence: 突然得到总裁的亲自接见，他感到受宠若惊。
example_sentence_en: Suddenly being received by the president personally, he felt overwhelmed by the favor.

example_sentence: 尽管收入微薄，他仍然坚持每月资助一名贫困学生。
example_sentence_en: Despite his meager income, he still insists on supporting a poor student monthly.

mandarin_意义: 比喻力量太小无济于事。
example_sentence: 这点钱对于巨大的债务来说，简直是杯水车薪。
example_sentence_en: This little money is utterly inadequate for such a huge debt.
usage_note: Literally "a cup of water for a wagon of burning wood."

example_sentence: 政府正在采取措施帮助贫困人口脱贫。
example_sentence_en: The government is taking measures to help the impoverished population out of poverty.

example_sentence: 在朋友们的帮助下，他终于度过了这次经济难关。
example_sentence_en: With the help of friends, he finally got through this financial crisis.

example_sentence: 这位企业家已经先后资助了几十名失学儿童。
example_sentence_en: This entrepreneur has successively subsidized dozens of dropouts.

example_sentence: 学校组织学生为患病的同学进行募捐。
example_sentence_en: The school organized students to raise funds for a sick classmate.

example_sentence: 村民们带着花生和水果去慰劳修路的工人们。
example_sentence_en: Villagers brought peanuts and fruit to reward the road workers.

example_sentence: 本协会的宗旨是促进中外文化交流。
example_sentence_en: The mission of this association is to promote cultural exchange.

英文意义: stand by with folded arms; look on
example_sentence: 看到别人有困难，我们不能袖手旁观。
example_sentence_en: When seeing others in trouble, we cannot just stand by and look on.

example_sentence: 他的演讲精彩极了，听众佩服得五体投地。
example_sentence_en: His speech was brilliant; the audience admired him utterly.

英文意义: atone for one's crimes by good deeds
example_sentence: 他希望通过在接下来的比赛中拿金牌来将功补过。
example_sentence_en: He hopes to atone for his mistakes by winning a gold medal in the next match.

example_sentence: 既然是您的要求，那我一定遵命。
example_sentence_en: Since it's your request, I will certainly obey.

example_sentence: 我们要尊重残疾人，为他们提供更多的便利。
example_sentence_en: We should respect people with disabilities and provide more convenience for them.

example_sentence: 盲人可以通过触摸布莱叶盲文来阅读。
example_sentence_en: Blind people can read by touching Braille.

英文意义: as easy as falling off a log
example_sentence: 这道题对他这个数学天才来说简直是易如反掌。
example_sentence_en: This problem is as easy as falling off a log for a math genius like him.

example_sentence: 他的左手小拇指在受伤后有点不灵活。
example_sentence_en: His left pinky is a bit stiff after the injury.

example_sentence: 炒菜时放点醋这种调料可以增加香味。
example_sentence_en: Adding vinegar as a seasoning when cooking can enhance the aroma.

example_sentence: 突然的一场大雨把大家都淋得很狼狈。
example_sentence_en: A sudden heavy rain left everyone in a sorry state.

example_sentence: 喝醉的他跌跌撞撞地往家走去。
example_sentence_en: Drunk, he staggered his way home.

example_sentence: 他找工作时到处碰壁，心情非常沮丧。
example_sentence_en: He hit a brick wall everywhere while looking for a job and felt very depressed.

example_sentence: 看到孩子终于懂事了，母亲感到非常欣慰。
example_sentence_en: Seeing that the child finally became sensible, the mother felt very gratified.

example_sentence: 只有社会稳定，人民才能安居乐业。
example_sentence_en: Only with social stability can the people live and work in peace.

example_sentence: 经过一段时间的治疗，他的身体已经完全康复了。
example_sentence_en: After a period of treatment, his body has fully recovered.

example_sentence: 精准扶贫是国家当前的一项重要工作。
example_sentence_en: Targeted poverty alleviation is an important current task for the country.

example_sentence: 消费者的维权意识正在不断增强。
example_sentence_en: Consumers' awareness of protecting their rights is constantly increasing.

example_sentence: 希望助学金能帮助贫困学子圆大学梦。
example_sentence_en: I hope the student aid grant can help poor students fulfill their college dreams.

mandarin_意义: 把钱或物发给需要的人。
example_sentence: 救灾物资正在有序地向灾民发放。
example_sentence_en: Disaster relief supplies are being orderly distributed to the victims.

example_sentence: 两国决定开展全方位的经济合作。
example_sentence_en: The two countries decided to carry out all-around economic cooperation.

example_sentence: 我们社区经常组织老年人开展文体活动。
example_sentence_en: Our community often organizes cultural and sports activities for the elderly.

example_sentence: 爷爷每天都乐呵呵的，好像从来没有烦心事。
example_sentence_en: Grandpa is smilingly happy every day, as if he never has worries.

mandarin_意义: 自愿参加无报酬工作人员。
example_sentence: 暑假期间，很多中学生去图书馆当义工。
example_sentence_en: During summer break, many middle school students work as volunteers at the library.

example_sentence: 提高全民族的科学文化素质非常重要。
example_sentence_en: It is very important to improve the scientific and cultural quality of the whole nation.

example_sentence: 这里集聚了全国最顶尖的科研人才。
example_sentence_en: The nation's top scientific research talents are gathered here.

example_sentence: 这幅画表现出一种极高的艺术境界。
example_sentence_en: This painting shows a very high artistic realm.

example_sentence: 他在学校把学生会的工作干得有声有色。
example_sentence_en: He ran the student union work at school in an impressive and vivid way.

mandarin_意义: 确认承担抚养或保护任务。
example_sentence: 市民可以认养公园里的小树，并负责照看。
example_sentence_en: Citizens can adopt a small tree in the park and be responsible for looking after it.

example_sentence: 志愿者们在海滩上捡拾游客丢弃的垃圾。
example_sentence_en: Volunteers are picking up trash discarded by tourists on the beach.

mandarin_意义: 没有固定住所到处漂泊。
example_sentence: 他年轻时曾独自一人在异国他乡流浪。
example_sentence_en: He once wandered alone in a foreign land when he was young.

example_sentence: 社会各界积极为白血病患儿募捐，帮助他们治疗。
example_sentence_en: All sectors of society actively raise funds for children with leukemia to help them get treatment.
usage_note: Serious illness; common in charity contexts.

mandarin_意义: 谦辞，表示不敢接受夸奖或礼遇。
英文意义: you flatter me; I don't deserve it
example_sentence: 您太客气了，这个称赞我实在不敢当。
example_sentence_en: You're too kind—I really don't deserve such praise.

pinyin: wū lòu piān féng lián yè yǔ
mandarin_意义: 比喻不幸的事接连发生。
example_sentence: 他刚失业，家里又有人生病，真是屋漏偏逢连夜雨。
example_sentence_en: He had just lost his job when a family member fell ill—misfortune piled up.

pinyin: zhòng rén shí chái huǒyàn gāo
mandarin_意义: 比喻人多力量大，齐心协力事易成。
example_sentence: 募捐活动要靠大家参与，众人拾柴火焰高。
example_sentence_en: Fundraising needs everyone's participation—many hands make light work.

mandarin_意义: 以公益互助为宗旨的学生或社区组织。
example_sentence: 高中的时候，他在爱心社组织过多次义卖。
example_sentence_en: In high school, he organized many charity sales through the caring society.

mandarin_意义: 谦辞，表示愿意尽力效劳。
英文意义: serve you like a loyal dog or horse
example_sentence: 如果您需要帮忙，我愿意效犬马之劳。
example_sentence_en: If you need help, I am willing to serve you to the best of my ability.

mandarin_意义: 处于弱势、需要社会帮助的人群。
example_sentence: 志愿者定期走访社区，为弱势群体送去生活用品。
example_sentence_en: Volunteers regularly visit the community to deliver daily necessities to vulnerable groups.

mandarin_意义: 以真人为参与者的电视节目。
example_sentence: 现在很多年轻人喜欢看真人秀，觉得贴近生活。
example_sentence_en: Many young people enjoy reality shows because they feel close to everyday life.

example_sentence: 他刚到一个新行业，两眼一抹黑，只能从头学起。
example_sentence_en: He had just entered a new industry and was completely in the dark, so he had to learn from scratch.

mandarin_意义: 无子女或子女不在身边的老人。
example_sentence: 社区志愿者每周上门看望孤寡老人，陪他们聊天。
example_sentence_en: Community volunteers visit elderly people without family support weekly to chat with them.

mandarin_意义: 子女离家后独自生活的老人。
example_sentence: 很多空巢老人需要社区提供日间照料服务。
example_sentence_en: Many empty-nest elderly need daytime care services from the community.

mandarin_意义: 对临终病人给予身体和心理上的照顾。
example_sentence: 医院为晚期病人提供临终关怀，让他们有尊严地离开。
example_sentence_en: The hospital provides end-of-life care so terminally ill patients can leave with dignity.

pinyin: wù yǐ shàn xiǎo ér bù wéi
mandarin_意义: 不要因为是小事就不去做善事。
英文意义: do not fail to do good because it seems small
example_sentence: 捐款多少不重要，勿以善小而不为，点滴也能帮助别人。
example_sentence_en: The amount donated does not matter—do not fail to do good because it seems small; every bit helps.

example_sentence: 如果你有任何疑问，可以拨打咨询电话。
example_sentence_en: If you have any questions, you can call the consultation number.

example_sentence: 为了健康，我们应该每年进行一次体检。
example_sentence_en: For health, we should undergo a physical check-up once a year.

example_sentence: 人上了年纪，记性就越来越差了。
example_sentence_en: As people get older, their memory gets worse and worse.

mandarin_意义: 形容情况严重难以承受。
example_sentence: 今天的活儿真多，把我累得够呛。
example_sentence_en: There was so much work today; it wore me out terribly.

example_sentence: 他是这个项目的总管，负责协调各方工作。
example_sentence_en: He is the manager of this project, responsible for coordinating all parties.

example_sentence: 作为班长，他肩上的担子可不轻啊。
example_sentence_en: As the class monitor, the burden on his shoulders is not light.

example_sentence: 这种颜色介于红色和紫色之间。
example_sentence_en: This color is between red and purple.

example_sentence: 随着年龄的增长，人的听力会逐渐减退。
example_sentence_en: As age increases, one's hearing will gradually decline.

example_sentence: 长途旅行后，他感到非常疲乏。
example_sentence_en: After the long trip, he felt very fatigued.

example_sentence: 由于最近压力太大，他变得有些健忘。
example_sentence_en: Due to too much pressure lately, he has become a bit forgetful.

example_sentence: 长期熬夜是对身体非常不利的不良习惯。
example_sentence_en: Staying up late long-term is an unhealthy habit that's very bad for the body.

example_sentence: 酗酒不仅伤害身体，还可能引发社会问题。
example_sentence_en: Excessive drinking not only hurts the body but can also cause social problems.

example_sentence: 合理的膳食对维持身体健康至关重要。
example_sentence_en: A reasonable diet is crucial for maintaining good health.

example_sentence: 这种饮食方式会导致体内的微量元素失衡。
example_sentence_en: This way of eating will lead to an imbalance of trace elements in the body.

example_sentence: 不健康的饮食习惯是许多疾病的祸根。
example_sentence_en: Unhealthy eating habits are the root cause of many diseases.

example_sentence: 他每天晚上都有应酬，很少回家吃饭。
example_sentence_en: He has social engagements every night and rarely eats at home.

英文意义: hold out; keep up despite difficulties
example_sentence: 生病了就要休息，不要硬撑着去上班。
example_sentence_en: If you're sick, you should rest; don't force yourself to go to work.

英文意义: after a long time; over the years
example_sentence: 只要天长日久地坚持下去，你一定会成功的。
example_sentence_en: As long as you persist over a long period, you will surely succeed.

example_sentence: 破坏环境的行为最终会产生严重的恶果。
example_sentence_en: Acts of environmental destruction will eventually produce severe consequences.

example_sentence: 在网络时代，信息泄露事件已经屡见不鲜了。
example_sentence_en: In the internet age, data leak incidents are already a common occurrence.

example_sentence: 这种古老的传统一直延续到了今天。
example_sentence_en: This ancient tradition has continued until today.

example_sentence: 这家便利店提供全天候的二十四小时服务。
example_sentence_en: This convenience store provides round-the-clock service.

英文意义: stay up late; stay up all night
example_sentence: 为了赶这份报告，他昨晚熬夜到了凌晨三点。
example_sentence_en: To finish this report, he stayed up until 3 a.m. last night.

example_sentence: 看完电影后，我们一起去吃个宵夜吧。
example_sentence_en: After watching the movie, let's go get a midnight snack together.

example_sentence: 他的日程表每天都安排得满满当当的。
example_sentence_en: His schedule is packed full every day.

mandarin_意义: 消耗过度；提取超过金额。
example_sentence: 过度劳累会让身体处于严重的透支状态。
example_sentence_en: Overwork will put the body in a state of severe overexertion/drain.

英文意义: strike a balance between work and rest
example_sentence: 科学的学习方法应该做到张弛有度。
example_sentence_en: Scientific study methods should involve a balance between work and rest.

example_sentence: 科学研究发现，人的身高很大程度上由基因决定。
example_sentence_en: Scientific research has found that height is largely determined by genes.

example_sentence: 这种疾病具有明显的家族遗传倾向。
example_sentence_en: This disease has a clear family hereditary tendency.

example_sentence: 他只是在吓唬你，别当真。
example_sentence_en: He's just scaring you; don't take it seriously.

example_sentence: 临行前，老师语重心长地嘱咐我要好好照顾自己。
example_sentence_en: Before I left, the teacher earnestly advised me to take good care of myself.

example_sentence: 运动是保持健康的灵丹妙药。
example_sentence_en: Exercise is a miracle medicine for maintaining health.

example_sentence: 我们应该保持营养均衡，多吃蔬菜水果。
example_sentence_en: We should maintain a balanced nutrition and eat more fruits and vegetables.

example_sentence: 她是一个性格开朗的女孩，大家都喜欢和她交朋友。
example_sentence_en: She is a cheerful girl; everyone likes to be friends with her.

example_sentence: 他在处理矛盾时，态度总是非常平和。
example_sentence_en: His attitude is always very calm when handling conflicts.

example_sentence: 清晨到山里散散步，让人感到神清气爽。
example_sentence_en: Taking a walk in the mountains in the early morning makes one feel refreshed.

example_sentence: 学校一直倡导垃圾分类，保护校园环境。
example_sentence_en: The school has always advocated trash sorting to protect the campus environment.

example_sentence: 他的这段话对这个问题的分析非常精辟。
example_sentence_en: His words were a very incisive analysis of this problem.

example_sentence: 长辈们的这些话都是金玉良言，你要记在心里。
example_sentence_en: The words of your elders are all pearls of wisdom; you should keep them in mind.

example_sentence: 他为了赶项目，成了名副其实的工作狂。
example_sentence_en: To finish the project, he became a real workaholic.
usage_note: Can be neutral or mildly critical.

mandarin_意义: 比喻做事特别卖力的人。
example_sentence: 这段时间他像拼命三郎一样，天天加班到深夜。
example_sentence_en: Lately he works like mad, staying at the office until late every night.

example_sentence: 你估计的八九不离十，结果和你说的大致一样。
example_sentence_en: Your estimate was pretty close—the result was roughly what you said.

example_sentence: 随着年龄增长，人的代谢水平会逐渐下降。
example_sentence_en: As people age, their metabolic level gradually declines.

mandarin_意义: 比喻听过就算、不放在心上。
英文意义: words in one ear and out the other
example_sentence: 父母的劝告，他常常当作耳边风。
example_sentence_en: He often treats his parents' advice as words in one ear and out the other.

mandarin_意义: 依靠过去的积累，不再努力。
英文意义: live off past achievements; rest on one's laurels
example_sentence: 不能一辈子吃老本，还要不断学习新东西。
example_sentence_en: You cannot live off past achievements forever—you must keep learning.

pinyin: rén zài jiānghú, shēn bù yóu jǐ
mandarin_意义: 比喻环境所迫，不能完全按自己意愿行事。
英文意义: in the world one cannot always do as one pleases
example_sentence: 工作忙，陪家人的时间少，真是人在江湖，身不由己。
example_sentence_en: Work is busy and there is little time for family—one cannot always do as one pleases.
usage_note: Explains constraints, not excuse for wrongdoing.

mandarin_意义: 指固定的上班作息时间。
example_sentence: 很多上班族过着朝九晚五的生活。
example_sentence_en: Many office workers live a nine-to-five life.

pinyin: rì chū ér zuò, rì luò ér xī
mandarin_意义: 形容作息规律、勤劳朴实的生活。
英文意义: rise at sunrise and rest at sunset
example_sentence: 他退休后回到乡下，日出而作，日落而息，身体反而更好了。
example_sentence_en: After retiring to the countryside, he rose at sunrise and rested at sunset, and his health improved.

pinyin: fǎn qí dào ér xíng zhī
mandarin_意义: 采取与常规相反的做法。
英文意义: do the opposite of the usual way
example_sentence: 大家都熬夜，他反其道而行之，坚持早睡早起。
example_sentence_en: While everyone stays up late, he does the opposite and keeps early hours.

mandarin_意义: 长期存在、发展缓慢的疾病。
example_sentence: 久坐、熬夜可能增加颈椎病、脂肪肝等慢性病的风险。
example_sentence_en: Sitting too long and staying up late may raise the risk of chronic illnesses such as cervical spondylosis and fatty liver.
usage_note: Includes 三高、神经衰弱、心脑血管病等常见说法。

英文意义: buy regret medicine (fig.: can't undo the past)
example_sentence: 世上没有买后悔药的地方，做决定前要慎重。
example_sentence_en: There is nowhere to buy regret medicine—think carefully before you decide.

mandarin_意义: 比喻能帮人顺利进入理想学校或行业的有利条件。
example_sentence: 他靠自己的努力考上了大学，而不是靠什么金钥匙。
example_sentence_en: He got into university through his own effort, not through any golden key.

mandarin_意义: 自己作主、不受他人支配的性质。
example_sentence: 孩子长大后，父母应逐步培养他的自主性。
example_sentence_en: As children grow up, parents should gradually foster their autonomy.
